ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was first recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the segment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the segment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the visit */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL visited */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit in microseconds */,
  "from_visit" INTEGER /* ID of the previous visit (if any) */,
  "transition" INTEGER /* Transition type (e.g., link, typed, auto_bookmark) */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment visited */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit in microseconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the visit */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL that referred the user to the current URL */,
  "is_first_visit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this is the user's first visit to the URL */,
  "is_returning_visit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this is a returning visit to the URL */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the visit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit metric */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "incremented_omnibox_typed_score" INTEGER /* Incremented omnibox typed score */,
  "pageviews" INTEGER /* Number of page views during the visit */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks during the visit */,
  "scroll_depth" REAL /* Percentage of the page scrolled during the visit */,
  "bounce_rate" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the visit was a bounce (user left after viewing only one page) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_metrics_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_visits" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit in microseconds */,
  "is_first_user_visit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this is the user's first visit to the URL */,
  "is_returning_user_visit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this is a returning visit to the URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user visit was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
